Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 235 

PRE_ICL_INNPP_COINS_2M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Coinsurance Split Network Standard Retail — Two-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a two-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using an in-network non-preferred preferred pharmacy (INNPP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy 
within a split network) during the
